chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C.P.No.S-869 of 2024 Date Order with signature of the Judge 1. For hearing of CMA 6584/2024 2. For hearing of CMA 6585/2024, 3. For hearing of main case. 19.08.2024. Petitioner Azhar Khan in person. Respondent Muhammad Amjad in person. = Petitioner is present so also respondent, who submits that in terms of execution application, vacant and peaceful possession of the premises viz. a shop situated on plot No.87 Landhi Qaidabad, Malir Karachi has been handed over to him. Petitioner has confirmed this fact. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed having become infructuous alongwith listed applications. The petition stands disposed of. JUDGE A.K
